## Summary

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî New feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî Documentation only
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî Tests only
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî Tooling, deps, config
- [ ] `ci` ‚Äî CI/CD changes
- [ ] `perf` ‚Äî Performance improvement
- [ ] `hotfix` ‚Äî Critical production fix

## Test Plan

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, keys, credentials)
- [ ] Domain layer has zero framework imports
- [ ] New adapters implement the full port interface
